code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{Logistics_FleetManagement}/callback
(Logistics_StockLevel) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (Logistics_FleetManagement) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{Logistics_DeliveryRoute} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (Logistics_TrackingNumber) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{Logistics_DeliveryRoute} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (Logistics_StockLevel) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{Logistics_TrackingNumber} 300 {Logistics_FleetManagement} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Logistics_Warehouse) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (Logistics_TrackingNumber) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{Logistics_FleetManagement}/players/{Logistics_TrackingNumber}
{Logistics_StockLevel} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (Logistics_StockLevel) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (Logistics_FleetManagement) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(Logistics_TrackingNumber) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Logistics_StockLevel) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{Logistics_Warehouse} {Logistics_DeliveryRoute}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Logistics_TrackingNumber}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{Logistics_DeliveryRoute}/messages
{Logistics_TrackingNumber], components: [Logistics_StockLevel] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[Logistics_FleetManagement] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{Logistics_TrackingNumber}/messages/@original
(Logistics_TrackingNumber) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{Logistics_FleetManagement}/messages/@original
{Logistics_FleetManagement)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (Logistics_Warehouse) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{Logistics_Warehouse} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{Logistics_FleetManagement} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(Logistics_Warehouse) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{Logistics_StockLevel}/players/{Logistics_FleetManagement} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{Logistics_StockLevel}/messages/{Logistics_FleetManagement}
{Logistics_TrackingNumber] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (Logistics_Warehouse) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的时序图，展示用户在Discord里用/play命令点歌后的整个流程。从用户输入指令开始，一直到音乐真正播放出来，中间涉及好几个服务。
明白了，这个流程涉及哪些核心服务？我看到有Discord API，应该还有处理音频的后端服务吧？
对，核心服务包括：Gateway Service负责接收Discord的事件，Redis Pub/Sub做消息队列，Audio Service处理业务逻辑，PostgreSQL存数据，Lavalink负责实际的音频播放，还有YouTube API用来搜歌。
好的，我理一下：用户发/play命令，Discord API把INTERACTION_CREATE事件推给Gateway，Gateway验证权限后回一个延迟响应，让用户看到处理中的提示。然后Gateway去查PostgreSQL获取服务器设置，再通过Redis把命令发给Audio Service。这样对吗？
没错，但Redis这里要注意，Gateway是PUBLISH到频道，Audio Service订阅了这个频道，所以是异步解耦的。Audio Service收到消息后，先解析查询内容，然后去查数据库看当前队列状态。
接下来是搜歌逻辑吧？用户可能直接给YouTube链接，也可能给搜索词。如果是搜索词，Audio Service要通过Lavalink去调YouTube API。
对，这里要用alt分支。一种情况是用户给了YouTube URL，直接解析视频ID就行；另一种是搜索词，要走Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，Lavalink内部再去调YouTube的搜索API。搜到结果后Lavalink返回给Audio Service，Audio Service默认选第一条。
我加上这个alt分支。搜到歌之后，Audio Service会把搜索结果缓存到Redis对吧？用SETEX设置5分钟过期时间。
是的，缓存是为了避免重复搜索。然后进入关键逻辑：判断队列是否为空。这里又要分两种情况，用另一个alt。
如果队列为空，这首歌就是第一首，Audio Service要插入队列，然后让Lavalink创建player并连接到语音频道。Lavalink会从YouTube拉取音频流，编码成opus包发给Discord，Discord再播给用户。这个流程挺长的。
对，而且Lavalink和Discord之间还有双向的语音连接建立过程。同时Audio Service要更新Redis里的队列缓存，设置1小时过期。然后还要发UI更新消息。
等等，UI更新这里我有点混乱。如果是第一首歌，Audio Service要PUBLISH到discord-bot:ui:now频道，Gateway收到后往Discord频道发消息显示正在播放，还要删除原来的延迟响应消息。但如果只是加入队列，逻辑不一样？
没错，这是第三个alt分支。第一首歌要发完整的Now Playing消息带控制按钮，并删除原来的处理中提示；如果只是加入已有队列，Gateway直接通过webhook回复一条临时消息说已加入队列就行，不用走Redis那套。
清楚了。那播放过程中呢？Lavalink会定期给Audio Service发PlayerUpdate事件吧？
对，用loop表示每5秒一次。Lavalink发PlayerUpdate，Audio Service转发到Redis，Gateway订阅后根据需要更新UI，比如进度条。
我加上这个循环。那歌曲播放结束后的流程呢？
歌曲结束，Lavalink发TrackEnd事件给Audio Service。Audio Service先从数据库删除刚播完的歌，然后把队列里剩下的歌position都减1，重新索引。
之后又要判断队列状态了？
对，最后一个alt，三种情况：还有歌就继续播下一首；没歌但开了autoplay就推荐相似歌曲；没歌且没开autoplay就销毁player，更新UI显示队列结束。
autoplay推荐那里，是自己调自己吗？Audio Service内部获取相似曲目？
是的，画成Audio Service到Audio Service的自调用，标注一下基于最后播放的歌曲做推荐。
好的。销毁player是调Lavalink的DELETE /sessions/{id}/players/{guildId}接口吧？
没错，然后Audio Service发队列空事件到Redis，Gateway收到后PATCH更新Discord里的消息，显示队列已结束。
整个流程挺完整的。我确认一下参与者顺序：User、Discord API、Gateway Service、Redis Pub/Sub、Audio Service、PostgreSQL、Lavalink、YouTube API。这个排列合理吗？
可以，按调用层级从左到右排列。最后加几个Note标注关键阶段：开头说明用户意图，中间标注命令处理、音频处理等阶段，结尾标注流程完成。
都加上了，包括autonumber自动编号。我检查一下：用户发/play，Gateway处理，Redis中转，Audio Service执行业务，查DB、搜YouTube、管队列、调Lavalink播放，期间定期更新状态，结束后处理下一首或清理资源。整个闭环了。
完美，这个时序图能清晰展示/play命令的完整生命周期，从用户交互到音频播放再到资源清理，每个服务的职责和交互顺序都很清楚。
